If the BlackRock array can seemingly perform miracles with hundreds of electrodes penetrating one millimeter deep, then what can be accomplished with thousands of electrodes going two millimeters deep? So again, the long-term perspective is what makes Neuralink so captivating. There is no other device on the market or even in concept that will provide such a high-bandwidth connection.
